nasb.text: Thus all the work of Solomon was carried out from the day of the foundation of the house of the Lord, and until it was finished. So the house of the Lord was completed.

esv.text: Thus was accomplished all the work of Solomon from the day the foundation of the house of the Lord was laid until it was finished. So the house of the Lord was completed.

cnv.text: 從耶和華的殿奠基的日子起，直到建成，所羅門的一切工程都進行順利。這樣，耶和華的殿就完成了。

ccb.text: 从耶和华的殿奠基直到完工，所罗门所有的计划都已顺利完成。这样，耶和华的殿落成了。
